description: A student in their final semester needs to formally apply for graduation.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and guide them to the online graduation application.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides the correct URL from the registrar's website.

nodes.task_description: Run a preliminary degree audit to ensure the student is on track to complete all requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: The audit shows the student will meet all requirements upon successful completion of their current courses.

nodes.task_description: Assist the student in completing the application, including confirming the name they want printed on their diploma.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent helps the student submit the application successfully.
